title: Alcoholics Anonymous (AA)
blurb: Worldwide fellowship using the 12-step programme to help people stay sober. Free meetings in person and online, everywhere.

title: SMART Recovery
blurb: Science-based, self-empowering recovery using CBT and motivational tools. Free meetings online and in person, plus a worksheet toolbox.

title: Narcotics Anonymous (NA)
blurb: Worldwide 12-step fellowship for anyone recovering from drug addiction. Free meetings globally, including online.

title: Recovery Dharma
blurb: Peer-led, Buddhist-inspired recovery using mindfulness and community. Free meetings and a free book online.

title: Marijuana Anonymous (MA)
blurb: 12-step fellowship for people who want to stop using cannabis. Free meetings, many online.

title: Gamblers Anonymous (GA)
blurb: 12-step fellowship for compulsive gambling. Free meetings and support worldwide.

title: Nicotine Anonymous
blurb: 12-step fellowship for freedom from nicotine. Free meetings by phone, online, and in person.

title: Overeaters Anonymous (OA)
blurb: 12-step fellowship for compulsive eating and food behaviours. Free meetings worldwide.

title: Al-Anon Family Groups
blurb: Support for families and friends affected by someone else's drinking. Free meetings worldwide.

title: Adult Children of Alcoholics (ACA)
blurb: Support for adults who grew up with alcoholism or dysfunction. Free meetings and literature.

title: Co-Dependents Anonymous (CoDA)
blurb: 12-step fellowship for building healthy relationships and recovering from codependency. Free meetings.

title: Sex Addicts Anonymous (SAA)
blurb: 12-step fellowship for compulsive sexual behaviour. Free, confidential meetings including online.

title: r/pornfree & recovery communities
blurb: Free, active peer communities supporting people cutting back or quitting pornography.

title: Gaming Addicts Anonymous
blurb: 12-step fellowship for compulsive video gaming. Free online meetings and support.

title: SAMHSA National Helpline (US)
blurb: Free, confidential, 24/7 treatment referral and information for substance use. Call 1-800-662-4357.

title: Find A Helpline (worldwide)
blurb: Free, confidential support lines for addiction and crisis in over 130 countries.
